title: codonopsis lanceolata
intro: Codonopsis lanceolata, also known as Dong Quai or Chinese Bellflower, is a perennial plant native to China and the Himalayas, belonging to the Campanulaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Codonopsis lanceolata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and enhancing immune function, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Codonopsis lanceolata can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
